about_text: GramVartha helps Grampanchayats share official notices and Government Resolutions (GRs) with citizens easily and effectively.
f1_desc: End-to-end encryption ensures your data remains confidential and protected from unauthorized access.
f2_desc: Experience blazing fast performance with our optimized architecture and global CDN network.
f3_desc: Join thousands of active users who contribute to making our platform better every day.
welcome: Stay informed, stay connected with GramVartha
footer: Empowering communities with transparent information and digital governance
tagline: Empowering villages with timely news and updates
governance_desc: GramVartha bridges citizens and their Gram Panchayat. Access notices, report issues, and reach officials — all from your phone, no paperwork needed.
footer_description: Connecting rural communities with their local government through transparent digital governance.
feature.no_login: No login required — scan and access instantly
vision.author: — GramVartha Vision
login.title: Admin Login
login.heading: Welcome back
login.subheading: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard
login.switch: Already have an account? Sign in
register.title: Admin Registration
register.heading: Create an account
features_title: Powerful tools for smart village management
feature1_desc: Scan QR codes to instantly view notices, announcements, and updates from your village administration.
feature2_desc: Get real-time alerts for emergencies and important updates to ensure citizen safety and awareness.
feature3_desc: Manage village data, users, and activities efficiently from a centralized dashboard.
feature4_desc: Analyze data, track engagement, and monitor village activities with powerful analytics tools.
